title: Code-to-Figma component mapping registry
description: Pro-tier stand-in for Figma Code Connect: a 1:1 mapping from each React chrome component to its Figma node, enforced by scripts/figma-registry-check.ts. Authored by the generator (--write); Figma bindings filled after seeding (plan W01.P09).

name.description: The exported React component name; the Figma main-component name must match it verbatim (naming-parity contract).

source.description: POSIX-relative path from frontend/ to the component's source file.

figmaNodeId.description: The Figma node id of the bound main component, or null until seeded.

figmaUrl.description: The Figma URL of the bound node, or null until seeded.
